display.name: Wardenless Gate Toll
display.short_description: A ruined toll gate leans across the path. Its iron box still hangs shut, and the stripped hinges are just good enough to matter.

choices.label: Strip the hinge pins
choices.summary: Work the heavy pins loose and fold the iron back into your weapon.

choices.label: Crack the toll box
choices.summary: Force the rotted lock and claim the silver no warden came back for.
